title: spiranthes romanzoffiana var. diluvialis
intro: Spiranthes romanzoffiana var. diluvialis, commonly known as the Diluvialis Lady's Tresses, is a rare orchid species native to North America. It is characterized by its unique, spiraling stems and white, drooping flowers. Traditionally, this plant has been used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Spiranthes romanzoffiana var. diluvialis include reducing inflammation, promoting wound healing, and supporting the immune system, and it can be prepared as a tincture, tea, or salve for various herbal applications.
